Resume data:
{'job_description': 'Description

Kickstart Your Career in Software Development with Real Projects!

We are looking for passionate and driven interns who are eager to learn, build, and work on real-world applications. If you love coding and want hands-on experience in open-source technologies, this is the perfect opportunity for you!


What Youll Do

Work on Frappe-based ERP systems using Python
Customize, configure, and develop real business solutions
Participate in testing, debugging, and documentation
Collaborate with teams and understand business workflows
Get exposure to client requirements and problem-solving

Required Skills

Basic knowledge of Python & MySQL
Understanding of REST APIs & JSON
Familiarity with Git (version control)
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Exposure to ERP systems (preferred, not mandatory)

Why Join Us?

Hands-on experience on live projects
Work in a fast-growing open-source environment
Mentorship from experienced developers
Opportunity to convert into a full-time role
Build strong technical and business understanding

Stipend

9000 per month


Who Can Apply?

Students or freshers passionate about software development
Candidates eager to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment
Apply now and start your journey in real-world software development!


Role: Software Development - Other
Industry Type: IT Services & Consulting
Department: Engineering - Software & QA
Employment Type: Full Time, Permanent
Role Category: Software Development
Education
UG: Graduation Not Required
Key Skills
Skills highlighted with ‘‘ are preferred keyskills
Application DevelopmentMySQLPython
GithubRest Api Development
About company
Welcome to Satat Tech, where we specialize in delivering cutting-edge solutions designed to propel your vision forward. Our commitment to excellence spans across various domains, including infrastructure management, application development, and comprehensive testingboth automated and manual.

What We Do

At Satat Tech, we understand that technology is the backbone of modern business. That’s why we focus on crafting solutions that not only meet your immediate needs but also drive long-term success. Our services include:

Company Info
Address:
D-504, SUKOMAL-1 SOC., SARTHAK TOWERS Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 380015, AHMEDABAD, Gujarat, India
Beware of imposters!
Naukri.com does not promise a job or an interview in exchange of money.
